meta.description: Shorten URLs and track clicks with our powerful platform.
how.shorten_desc: Paste your long URL and get a clean, branded short link in seconds.
how.share_desc: Spread your links across social media, email, or print with total confidence.
how.track_desc: Get real-time insights on clicks, locations, and referrer performance.
docs.intro_desc: Whether you are a casual user or a professional developer, our platform provides all the tools you need to manage your links effectively.
docs.why_choose_us_desc: Our platform offers faster redirects, deeper analytics, and better customization than any other tool.
docs.global_reach_desc: Your links are served from nodes around the world for maximum speed and uptime.
docs.dark_mode_desc: Our platform is built with a 'Dark First' philosophy, ensuring a premium experience that's easy on the eyes.
docs.guest_step_1_desc: Go to the landing page of ScrollWebLink.
docs.guest_step_2_desc: Enter your long URL and solve the hCaptcha verification.
docs.guest_step_3_desc: Instantly get your short link and share it anywhere.
docs.token_gen_desc: To use our API, you must authenticate using a Personal Access Token created in your account settings.
docs.gen_step_1: Log in and navigate to your
docs.gen_step_2: Scroll down to the section named
docs.gen_step_4: Copy the token immediately and store it safely.
docs.token_warning: Tokens are only shown once. If you lose it, you will need to revoke and generate a new one.
docs.api_ref_desc: Automate your shortening process with our developer-friendly API endpoints.
docs.api_list_desc: Fetch a paginated list of all your shortened links.
docs.api_create_desc: Create a new short link with custom slugs and enhanced security.
docs.api_stats_desc: Retrieve real-time click data, including country and device breakdowns.
